pr.title: Enable Codex CLI as a local LLM provider
pr.body:
## Summary
- add codex-cli as a local-auth LLM provider in setup, preflight, doctor, and credential checks
- route text LLM calls through local `codex` CLI and keep provider image handling text-only where needed
- add a Codex CLI fix adapter and wire runPipeline, dtc fix, and MCP fix surfaces to it

## Test Plan
- [x] pnpm test
- [x] pnpm typecheck
- [x] pnpm vitest run cli/__tests__/pipeline-codex-cli.test.ts packages/fix/__tests__/codex-cli-fix.test.ts cli/__tests__/codex-cli-fix-surfaces.test.ts
- [x] pnpm --filter @appifex/cli exec tsc --noEmit
- [x] pnpm --filter @appifex/fix exec tsc --noEmit
- [x] git diff --check
pr.author: rayliu-factory
